item.title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 Instant
item.guid: OpenAI-发布-GPT-5.5-Instant
item.description:
Early this morning, OpenAI officially released GPT-5.5 Instant, making it the default model for ChatGPT, replacing the previous GPT-5.3 Instant. 今天凌晨，OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.5 Instant，将其设为 ChatGPT 的默认模型，取代此前的 GPT-5.3 Instant。

This update focuses on three directions: accuracy, response style, and personalization capabilities. 此次更新聚焦三个方向：准确性、回复风格和个性化能力。

    In terms of accuracy, GPT-5.5 Instant's hallucination rate in high-risk areas such as healthcare, law, and finance has decreased by 52.5% compared to the previous version, and the error rate in incorrect conversations has reduced by 37.3%;

    Math and science test scores have also improved, with AIME 2025 scores rising from 65.4 to 81.2, GPQA from 78.5 to 85.6, MMMU-Pro from 69.2 to 76, and CharXiv from 75 to 81.6;

    In terms of response style, the new model is more concise, reducing unnecessary formatting, emojis, and follow-up questions;

    Regarding personalization capabilities, Plus and Pro users can have the model retrieve historical conversations, uploaded files, and associated Gmail content to receive answers that are more tailored to their personal situations.

At the same time, the "Memory sources" feature has been launched. When an answer uses personal background information, users can view which historical conversations or saved memory entries were specifically accessed, and can delete or correct them at any time. Users who do not wish to be recorded can choose temporary conversation mode. 与此同时，「记忆来源（Memory sources）」功能同步上线，当回答用到个人背景信息时，用户可查看具体调用了哪些历史对话或已保存的记忆条目，并可随时删除或修正。不想被记录的用户可选择临时对话模式。

OpenAI will also host an AI-led launch party today at its San Francisco headquarters. Altman revealed that during the preparation, he directly asked the model "what kind of party it wanted," and the model provided a list: OpenAI 今天还将在旧金山总部举办一场由 AI 主导策划的上线派对。奥特曼透露，他在筹备过程中直接问了模型「想要什么样的派对」，模型给出了一份清单：

The speaking segment should be as short as possible, with a toast from human creators, but the model itself does not want to be on stage; there also needs to be a session to collect suggestions for GPT-5.6. The party is scheduled for 5:55 PM, which was also the model's own choice.

The guest list was filtered by Codex from tweet replies, with over 8,000 people signing up within 24 hours. Unselected users received compensation in the form of a 10x increase in Codex usage credits. Altman also responded to netizens' teasing about whether Elon Musk was invited, saying, "The world needs more love, and he can come if he wants to." 受邀名单由 Codex 从推文回复中筛选，24 小时内逾 8000 人报名。未被选中的用户收到了 Codex 调用额度提升 10 倍的补偿。奥特曼还回应了网友关于马斯克是否受邀的调侃，称「世界需要更多爱，他想来也可以来」。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, GPT-5.5 Instant was released, and Altman also invited Elon Musk to an AI-hosted party 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，GPT-5.5 Instant 发布，奥特曼还邀请马斯克参加 AI 办的派对

item.title: 曝 Siri 将推出独立 App，对标 ChatGPT
item.guid: 曝-Siri-将推出独立-App，对标-ChatGPT
item.description:
Bloomberg reported that Apple will create a standalone app entry point for Siri in iOS 27. 彭博社报道，苹果将会为 iOS 27 的 Siri 打造独立的 App 入口。

According to reports, the standalone Siri will feature historical conversation review and a new chat interface, allowing users to choose third-party AI models. The report indicates that this move is intended to compete with third-party AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. 据介绍，独立后的 Siri 将拥有历史对话回顾以及全新的聊天界面，并允许用户选择第三方的 AI 模型。报道指出，这一做法是为了对标 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 等第三方 AI 聊天机器人。

It's worth noting that the new Siri not only features a brand-new interface design but will also support third-party Agent functionalities via the App Store and possess the ability to process multiple commands in a single sentence. 值得一提的是，新版 Siri 不仅拥有全新的界面设计，还能通过 App Store 来支持第三方 Agent 功能、拥有一句话处理多项指令的能力。

Furthermore, according to previous information, iOS 27's camera will also include a Siri mode for AI visual recognition and other functions. 另据此前信息，iOS 27 的相机中还会加入 Siri 模式，用于 AI 视觉识别等功能。

item.title: 鸿蒙智行回应零重力座椅夹人
item.guid: 鸿蒙智行回应零重力座椅夹人
item.description:
Recently, a video appeared online showing the Enjoy S9 zero-gravity seat without anti-pinch protection. 近期，一段享界 S9 零重力座椅无防夹保护的视频出现在网络。

From the video, a child was sitting on the front passenger seat as it was folding, but the seat did not pause its movement in time and ultimately completed the fold. 从视频来看，小朋友坐在正在折叠状态的副驾座椅上，但座椅并未及时暂停动作并且最后完成折叠。

And yesterday, the Harmony Intelligent Mobility spokesperson account released a statement explaining the situation: 而在昨天，鸿蒙智行发言人账号发布情况说明：

Some Harmony Intelligent Mobility models are equipped with second-row zero-gravity seats, all of which have an anti-pinch function. The system real-time senses changes in seat pressure and stops movement and rebounds for protection when a trigger threshold is reached.

After technical verification, the scenario in the viral video did not reach the trigger threshold for the anti-pinch function.

Harmony Intelligent Mobility also stated that multiple safety protections have been set up in the design of the zero-gravity seat to ensure passenger safety: 鸿蒙智行方面还表示，在零重力座椅工况设计上还设置了多重安全防护保障乘员安全：

    The front passenger seat will not fold when it detects an occupancy signal or when the seat belt is inserted;

    When the zero-gravity seat is activated by voice, the system will remind the user to pay attention to passenger and item safety, and the user needs to confirm again;

    During the unfolding of the zero-gravity seat, clicking the physical button for the zero-gravity seat will immediately stop the unfolding.

*Image content from blogger "Huaijiao Buganxin" *图片内容来自博主「槐角不甘心」

item.title: iPhone 17 包揽 2026 年 Q1 全球最畅销智能手机前三
item.guid: iPhone-17-包揽-2026-年-Q1-全球最畅销智能手机前三
item.description:
According to the latest "Global Handset Model Sales Tracker" report released yesterday by Counterpoint Research, Apple iPhone 17 became the world's best-selling smartphone in Q1 2026, accounting for 6% of global shipments; the top ten models collectively contributed 25% of global shipments, setting a record for the highest concentration in a single quarter. 据 Counterpoint Research 昨日发布的最新《全球手机型号销售追踪报告》，苹果 iPhone 17 成为 2026 年第一季度全球最畅销智能手机，占全球出货量的 6%；前十名机型合计贡献了全球出货量的 25%，创下一季度最高集中度纪录。

The iPhone 17 series took the top three spots, while Samsung's Galaxy A series occupied five positions in the top ten, and Xiaomi Redmi A5 ranked tenth. Data shows that the iPhone 17 achieved double-digit year-on-year growth in key markets such as China and the United States this quarter, and even tripled its growth in South Korea. iPhone 17 系列包揽前三名，三星 Galaxy A 系列则在前十中占据五席，小米 Redmi A5 位列第十。数据显示，iPhone 17 本季度在中国、美国等关键市场实现了两位数的同比增长，在韩国更实现了三倍增长。

As for Samsung, the Galaxy A series covers different price segments with multiple models, among which the Galaxy A07 4G was the best-selling Android smartphone this quarter, performing exceptionally well in emerging regions such as the Middle East, Africa, and Latin America; the flagship model Galaxy S26 Ultra narrowly missed the top ten, but its initial sales have already surpassed its predecessor. 三星方面，Galaxy A 系列以多款机型覆盖不同价位段，其中 Galaxy A07 4G 是本季度最畅销的安卓智能手机，在中东、非洲和拉丁美洲等新兴地区销量表现突出；旗舰机型 Galaxy S26 Ultra 以微弱差距未能进入前十，但初期销量已超越前代机型。

Karn Chauhan, a senior analyst at Counterpoint, pointed out that the share of the top ten models in global sales is expected to further expand this year. Persistent memory shortages are driving up component costs, putting greater pressure on Android manufacturers in the mass market. The market downturn is expected to have a more significant impact on the mid-to-low price segments, while the share of high-end models continues to grow. Counterpoint 高级分析师 Karn Chauhan 指出，前十名机型在全球销量中的份额预计将在今年进一步扩大。持续的内存短缺推高零部件成本，给安卓厂商在大众市场带来更大压力，市场下滑预计对中低价位段影响更为显著，高端机型份额则持续增长。

item.title: 曝苹果寻求英特尔、三星代工芯片
item.guid: 曝苹果寻求英特尔、三星代工芯片
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is exploring bringing in Intel and Samsung to manufacture its main processors, seeking alternatives to TSMC. 据彭博社报道，苹果正在研究引入英特尔和三星代工其主要处理器，以在台积电之外寻求备选。

Reporter Mark Gurman, citing informed sources, stated that Apple has held early-stage discussions with Intel regarding wafer foundry services, and Apple executives have also visited Samsung's advanced chip factory under construction in Texas. The cooperation is currently still in the exploratory phase. 记者 Mark Gurman 援引知情人士表示，苹果已与英特尔就晶圆代工服务进行早期阶段磋商，同时有苹果高管赴访三星位于德克萨斯州、尚在建设中的先进芯片工厂，目前合作仍处于探索阶段。

Supply shortages are the direct cause of these discussions. During the previous Q2 2026 earnings call, Apple CEO Tim Cook stated that the shortage of chips required for iPhones and Macs is constraining the company's growth, and "supply chain flexibility is below normal levels." 供应短缺是此次探讨的直接诱因。在此前的 2026 财年第二季度业绩电话会议上，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 表示，iPhone 和 Mac 所需芯片的短缺正在制约公司增长，「供应链的灵活性低于正常水平」。

Apple is currently collaborating with TSMC to expand local production capacity in Phoenix, Arizona, and is expected to receive 100 million chips from there this year, but this only covers a small portion of Apple's annual device shipments. Cook has previously warned multiple times about the risks of over-reliance on a single region for supply. 苹果目前正与台积电合作，在亚利桑那州凤凰城扩大本土产能，今年预计将从该地获得 1 亿颗芯片，但仅覆盖苹果年度设备出货量的一小部分。库克此前曾多次提示过度依赖单一地区供应的风险。

item.title: 郭明錤：OpenAI 首款 AI 手机提速，联发科定制芯片有望明年上半年量产
item.guid: 郭明錤：OpenAI-首款-AI-手机提速，联发科定制芯片有望明年上半年量产
item.description:
Yesterday, Tianfeng International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo updated his forecast for OpenAI's first AI phone, stating that the device's mass production schedule has been significantly advanced, and it is expected to enter the mass production phase as early as the first half of next year. 昨天，天风国际证券分析师郭明錤更新了对 OpenAI 首款 AI 手机的预测，称该设备的量产时间表已大幅提前，预计最早将于明年上半年进入量产阶段。

Regarding chip suppliers, MediaTek has currently become the strongest candidate, while Qualcomm was also previously considered. Ming-Chi Kuo revealed that the OpenAI phone will be equipped with a customized MediaTek chip, based on a modified Dimensity 9600, using TSMC's next-generation N2P process, and is expected to officially debut in the second half of this year. 在芯片供应商方面，联发科目前已成为最有力的候选方，高通此前也曾被列为考虑对象。郭明錤透露，OpenAI 手机将搭载联发科定制版芯片，基于天玑 9600 改款，采用台积电下一代 N2P 制程，预计于今年下半年正式亮相。

In terms of chip design, this customized chip will focus on AI capabilities rather than solely pursuing performance benchmarks. Among them, the ISP (Image Signal Processor) is listed as a "key selling point," enhancing the HDR processing pipeline and improving the device's visual understanding of its surroundings to fit the usage scenarios of AI phones that continuously perceive and analyze the real world. 在芯片设计上，该定制芯片将以 AI 能力为核心，而非单纯追求性能跑分。其中，ISP（图像信号处理器）被列为「主打卖点」，增强 HDR 处理管线，提升设备对周围环境的视觉理解能力，以契合 AI 手机持续感知与分析现实世界的使用场景。

Additionally, the chip is equipped with a dual NPU architecture for processing different types of AI tasks and supports LPDDR6 memory and UFS 5.0 storage. Ming-Chi Kuo estimates that if the project progresses smoothly, the combined shipments of this device in the coming year and 2028 are expected to reach approximately 30 million units. 此外，芯片还配备双 NPU 架构，用于处理不同类型的 AI 任务，并支持 LPDDR6 内存与 UFS 5.0 存储。郭明錤预计，若项目进展顺利，该设备明年与 2028 年的合计出货量有望达到约 3000 万部。

item.title: 豆包付费订阅价格曝光，官方回应：始终提供免费服务
item.guid: 豆包付费订阅价格曝光，官方回应：始终提供免费服务
item.description:
Recently, a paid version service statement appeared on the Doubao App Store page, disclosing three subscription tiers: 近日，豆包 App Store 页面出现付费版本服务声明，披露了三档订阅价格：

Standard version continuous monthly subscription for 68 yuan/month (continuous annual subscription for 688 yuan), enhanced version continuous monthly subscription for 200 yuan/month (continuous annual subscription for 2048 yuan), professional version continuous monthly subscription for 500 yuan/month (continuous annual subscription for 5088 yuan).

In terms of pricing, the standard version at 68 yuan/month is slightly lower than ChatGPT Plus's price of approximately 142 yuan/month; the professional version at 500 yuan/month is aimed at enterprise-level heavy productivity scenarios. Currently, no related payment entry points have appeared within Doubao's various products. 从定价来看，标准版 68 元/月略低于 ChatGPT Plus 约 142 元/月的价格；专业版 500 元/月则对标企业级重度生产力场景。目前，豆包各端产品内暂未出现相关付费入口。

According to a report by Yicai, Doubao officially responded that Doubao always provides free services, and on the basis of free services, Doubao is also exploring the launch of more value-added services to meet the differentiated needs of different users. 另据第一财经报道，豆包官方回应称，豆包始终提供免费服务，在免费服务的基础上，豆包也在探索推出更多增值服务，以满足不同用户的差异化需求。

Sources close to Doubao revealed that paid features will primarily focus on complex tasks and productivity scenarios, including PPT generation, in-depth data analysis, film and television production, ultra-long document parsing, professional AI painting, 4K video generation, etc. The free version will continue to cater to lightweight needs such as daily conversations, short copywriting, translation, and Q&A. 接近豆包的人士透露，付费功能将主要专注于复杂任务和生产力场景，包括 PPT 生成、深度数据分析、影视制作、超长文档解析、专业 AI 绘画、4K 视频生成等。免费版本则将继续面向日常对话、短文案、翻译、答疑等轻量需求。

🔗 Related reading: Doubao is launching a paid version, and something is more important than whether it's worth it 🔗 相关阅读： 豆包要推付费版了，有件事比值不值更重要

item.title: OpenAI 曾讨论拆分机器人和硬件部门，CFO 建议推迟上市至 2027 年
item.guid: OpenAI-曾讨论拆分机器人和硬件部门，CFO-建议推迟上市至-2027-年
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar privately suggested to the company's leadership that the IPO be postponed until next year, citing the company's inability to meet the public market's strict disclosure requirements. 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar 曾私下向公司领导层建议将 IPO 时间推迟至明年，理由是公司尚未具备满足公开市场严格信息披露要求的能力。

Meanwhile, another report revealed that Altman discussed splitting the robotics and consumer hardware divisions into separate entities late last year, allowing both to raise capital independently, operate autonomously, and reduce financial drag on the core business. 与此同时，另一篇报道披露，Altman 去年底曾讨论将机器人和消费硬件部门分拆为独立实体，以便两者能够独立融资、自主运营，同时减轻对核心业务的财务拖累。

However, the plan was ultimately rejected, partly because the new entities after the split might still need to be consolidated into OpenAI's balance sheet for accounting purposes. Insiders say the company may revisit this discussion in the future, possibly referencing Alphabet's holding company structure to disclose core and exploratory businesses separately in financial reports. 但该方案最终被否决，原因之一是分拆后的新实体在会计处理上仍可能需要并入 OpenAI 的资产负债表。知情人士称，公司未来仍可能重启这一讨论，届时或将参考 Alphabet 的控股公司架构，将核心业务与探索性业务在财务报告中分开披露。

OpenAI recently missed some internal user and revenue targets and is now focusing resources on core products, cutting the video generation tool Sora, and shifting to building "super apps" for developers and enterprise users to counter competitive pressure from Anthropic in the programming tools sector. OpenAI 近期错失了部分内部用户和营收目标，正将资源集中于核心产品，砍掉了视频生成工具 Sora、转向打造面向开发者和企业用户的「超级应用」，以应对 Anthropic 在编程工具领域带来的竞争压力。

External time pressure also exists. Banks have informed OpenAI and Anthropic that the first one to go public will receive priority market funding. 外部时间压力同样存在。银行方面告知 OpenAI 和 Anthropic，率先上市的一方将优先获得市场资金支持。

item.title: 苹果砍掉丐版 Mac mini
item.guid: 苹果砍掉丐版-Mac-mini
item.description:
During the May Day holiday, Apple quietly removed the 256GB entry-level Mac mini from its official website. The minimum configuration is now 16GB + 512GB, and the starting price has also increased to 5999 yuan. 五一假期期间，苹果悄悄从官网下架了 256GB 入门款版本的 Mac mini，现在最低配置为 16GB + 512GB，起售价也涨到了 5999 元。

🔗 Related reading: Apple quietly cut the "beggar's version" Mac mini, the era where everyone pays "AI tax" has arrived 🔗 相关阅读： 苹果悄悄砍掉丐版Mac mini，人人都要交「AI 税」的时代来了

Just the day before the delisting, Apple CEO Tim Cook admitted during an earnings call that the Mac mini and Mac Studio are facing severe "supply constraints". 而就在下架的前一天，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 在财报电话会议上承认，Mac mini 和 Mac Studio 正面临严重的「供应受限」。

He attributed the reason to these two products becoming popular AI and agent tool platforms, with market demand far exceeding expectations. Financial report data shows that Apple's total revenue in the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 reached $111.2 billion, a year-on-year increase of 17%, with Mac business growing against the trend by 6% to $8.4 billion. 他将原因归结为：这两款产品已成为颇受欢迎的 AI 与智能体工具平台，市场需求远超预期。财报数据显示，苹果 2026 财年第二季度总营收达 1112 亿美元，同比增长 17%，Mac 业务逆势增长 6%，达 84 亿美元。

item.title: 宇树机器人买票坐飞机：电池被没收，航班延误 1 小时
item.guid: 宇树机器人买票坐飞机：电池被没收，航班延误-1-小时
item.description:
According to CNN, a humanoid robot manufactured by Unitree Robotics recently flew on Southwest Airlines from Oakland, California, to San Diego. Due to its onboard lithium battery capacity exceeding FAA regulations, it was disassembled and temporarily confiscated by the crew on site, causing a flight delay of over 1 hour. 据 CNN 报道，近日，一台由宇树科技生产的人形机器人乘坐西南航空从加州奥克兰飞往圣地亚哥，因机载锂电池容量超出 FAA 规定上限，被机组人员现场拆卸并暂扣，导致航班延误逾 1 小时。

The robot, named "Bebop," belongs to Dallas-based equipment rental company Elite Event Robotics. Its main body is a Unitree G1 basic humanoid robot, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing approximately 70 pounds (about 31.75 kilograms). 这台名为「Bebop」的机器人隶属于达拉斯设备租赁公司 Elite Event Robotics，本体为宇树 G1 基础款人形机器人，身高 1.2 米，重约 70 磅（约 31.75 公斤）。

Because the shipping crate's weight exceeded Southwest Airlines' checked baggage limit, company staff purchased a passenger ticket for it. After the robot boarded, the crew first forcibly moved it from an aisle seat to a window seat for safety reasons, then discovered its power battery capacity exceeded the limit during a routine check, and ultimately demanded the battery be removed on site, otherwise refusing to take off. 由于运输箱重量超出西南航空托运限额，公司工作人员为其购买了一张客票。机器人登机后，机组人员先以安全为由将其从靠近过道的座位强制调至靠窗位置，随后在例行排查中发现其动力电池容量超标，最终要求现场拆除电池，否则拒绝起飞。

Upon arrival in San Diego, Bebop was unable to walk on its own due to loss of power, and staff had to manually carry it out of the terminal. Elite Event Robotics stated that they are trying to recover the confiscated battery and have expedited a replacement battery to Chicago to ensure subsequent performance schedules. 抵达圣地亚哥后，因失去动力，Bebop 无法自主行走，工作人员只得徒手将其搬出航站楼。Elite Event Robotics 表示，正在设法追回被扣电池，并已向芝加哥加急寄送备用电池，以保障后续演出行程。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 正在创造大量就业，「末日论」只会让人不敢用 AI
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-正在创造大量就业，「末日论」只会让人不敢用-AI
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated on the 4th local time, during an interview with MSNBC anchor Becky Quick at an event hosted by the Milken Institute, that artificial intelligence is "creating a lot of jobs," rather than being the driver of widespread unemployment as feared by some. 据 TechCrunch 报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋当地时间 4 日在米尔肯研究所举办的活动上接受 MSNBC 主播 Becky Quick 的访谈时表示，人工智能正在「创造大量就业机会」，而非外界所担忧的大规模失业推手。

Huang maintained an optimistic stance when discussing AI's impact on the labor market. He believes that AI is the best opportunity for America's "reindustrialization," driving the construction of a new batch of industrial factories – these factories produce the hardware required for AI infrastructure (which is Nvidia's core business). 黄仁勋在谈及 AI 对劳动力市场的影响时持乐观立场。他认为，AI 是美国「再工业化」的最佳机遇，驱动了一批新型工业工厂的建设 —— 这些工厂生产的正是 AI 基础设施所需的硬件（英伟达的核心业务即在于此）。

He also emphasized that automation replaces specific tasks, not entire jobs. 他同时强调，自动化取代的是具体任务，而非整个职位。

The purpose of work is related to the tasks within work, but they are not equivalent.

Regarding the claims that "AI will dominate humanity" or "will destroy many industries," Jensen Huang explicitly expressed his opposition. He stated that his biggest concern is that such sci-fi narratives will make the public fear AI and consequently refuse to use the technology. 对于「AI 将主宰人类」或「将摧毁大量行业」的论断，黄仁勋明确表示反对。他称自己最担忧的，是这类科幻式叙事令公众对 AI 产生恐惧，进而拒绝使用这项技术。

item.title: 小米昆仑新车再曝光
item.guid: 小米昆仑新车再曝光
item.description:
Recently, a set of spy photos suspected to be of a new Xiaomi car have been exposed. 近期，一组疑似小米新车的谍照图曝光。

According to blogger "Xiaoyugan," this model is Xiaomi's new Kunlun series (previously known as YU9). From the pictures, the new car is positioned as a mid-to-large SUV, featuring a newly designed front headlight and equipped with lidar on the top of the front. 据博主「小鱼干」消息，该车型为小米新车昆仑系列（此前被称为 YU9）。从图片来看，新车定位中大型 SUV，配备全新设计的前大灯设计，车头顶部配备激光雷达。

🔗 Related reading: No Xiaomi badge? Self-developed chip? Xiaomi YU9 leak summary 🔗 相关阅读： 不挂小米标？自研芯片？小米 YU9 爆料汇总

It is reported that although the outside world has become accustomed to calling Xiaomi's upcoming extended-range SUV "YU9," it is actually very likely to break away from the main Xiaomi brand and become an independent brand series. 据悉，尽管外界已经习惯将小米即将发布的增程 SUV 称为「YU9」，但实际上它很有可能会脱离小米主品牌，成为一个独立的品牌系列。

Currently, there are rumors that this series is highly likely to be named "Skynomad," with its Chinese name possibly being "Xuntian." The new car's rear and steering wheel will also feature the exclusive "SKYNOMAD" emblem, no longer bearing the familiar Xiaomi car logo. 目前有消息称， 该系列极大概率被命名为「Skynomad」，中文名或为「寻天」，新车的车尾和方向盘也将换成「SKYNOMAD」的专属标识，不再悬挂大家熟悉的小米车标。

Furthermore, this series will offer three sizes of new cars: the small five-seater Kunlun 10, the large five-seater Kunlun 20, and the large seven-seater Kunlun 30, with the Kunlun 20 offering a retractable roof. 并且该系列将提供三个尺寸的新车，分别为小五座的昆仑 10、大五座昆仑 20 以及大七座昆仑 30，其中昆仑 20 提供车顶升降。

item.title: 曝小米 18 Ultra 将推出玄戒 O3 特别版
item.guid: 曝小米-18-Ultra-将推出玄戒-O3-特别版
item.description:
According to GSMArena, citing tech leaker Yogesh Brar, the Xiaomi 18 Ultra may launch a special edition equipped with the self-developed Xuanjie O3 chip, expected to be officially released in December this year. 据 GSMArena 援引科技爆料人 Yogesh Brar 报道，小米 18 Ultra 可能推出搭载自研芯片玄戒 O3 的特别版，预计于今年 12 月正式发布。

Previously, there were reports that the Xuanjie O3 would first be equipped in the Xiaomi Mix Fold 5, expected to be released in August this year. 此前，已有消息称玄戒 O3 将率先搭载于小米 Mix Fold 5，预计今年 8 月发布。

According to the leaked information, the Xuanjie O3 adopts a new three-cluster design of "super large core + performance large core + small core" (Prime + Titanium + Little). 爆料信息来看，玄戒 O3 采用「超大核+性能大核+小核」（Prime + Titanium + Little）的新型三簇设计。

In terms of specific frequencies, its super large core frequency has increased from the previous generation Xuanjie O1's 3.89GHz to 4.05GHz, and the performance large core frequency has slightly increased to 3.42GHz. It is worth noting that the O3 "little core" frequency has significantly increased by 68% from 1.79GHz to 3.02GHz. 在具体频率上，其超大核主频由前代玄戒 O1 的 3.89GHz 提升至 4.05GHz，性能大核主频微增至 3.42GHz。值得关注的是，O3 「小核」主频从 1.79GHz 大幅提升 68% 至 3.02GHz。

item.title: 三星 One UI 9 固件再次泄露新机：Fold 8 外观无变化，阔折叠背面首曝
item.guid: 三星-One-UI-9-固件再次泄露新机：Fold-8-外观无变化，阔折叠背面首曝
item.description:
According to Android Authority, images of two upcoming foldable phones, the Galaxy Z Fold 8 (internal codename Q8) and the "Kuozhe" (internal codename H8), appeared in Samsung's One UI 9 pre-release firmware. This marks the second time Samsung has disclosed new phone information in its firmware, following the discovery of "Kuozhe" animations in One UI 9 in February this year. 据 Android Authority 报道，三星 One UI 9 预发布固件中出现了两款即将推出的折叠屏手机图片，分别为 Galaxy Z Fold 8（内部代号 Q8）与阔折叠（内部代号 H8），这是继今年 2 月在 One UI 9 中发现阔折叠动画后，三星再次在固件中披露新机信息。

From the firmware images, the appearance of the "Kuozhe" new phone highly matches the previously leaked engineering renders. The entire device has a wide, short, and thick proportion, with a rear camera module design style similar to the Galaxy S25 Edge. The outer screen is also a wide, short display, while the inner screen has a 4:3 ratio, more closely resembling a foldable tablet. 从固件图片来看，「阔折叠」新机的外观与此前流出的工程渲染图高度吻合，整机呈横宽短厚比例，后置摄像头模组的设计风格接近 Galaxy S25 Edge，外屏同样为宽幅矮屏，内屏则为 4:3 比例，更接近一台可折叠平板形态；

As for the Galaxy Z Fold 8, the firmware images show its appearance is almost identical to the Galaxy Z Fold 7, corroborating previously leaked renders. According to earlier leaks, the Fold 8 will feature a 5000mAh battery and support 45W wired fast charging. Galaxy Z Fold 8 方面，固件图片显示其外观与 Galaxy Z Fold 7 几乎一致，与此前流出的渲染图相互印证。据此前爆料，Fold 8 将搭载 5000mAh 电池，支持 45W 有线快充。

The Galaxy Z Fold 8 and "Kuozhe" are expected to officially debut on July 22nd at the Samsung Galaxy Unpacked event in London, alongside the Galaxy Z Flip 8 small foldable. Galaxy Z Fold 8 与阔折叠预计将于 7 月 22 日在伦敦举办的三星 Galaxy Unpacked 发布会上正式亮相，同场发布的还有 Galaxy Z Flip 8 小折叠。

item.title: Unity AI 公测上线：内置专属 Agent，官方 MCP Server 支持外部 IDE 直连引擎
item.guid: Unity-AI-公测上线：内置专属-Agent，官方-MCP-Server-支持外部-IDE-直连引擎
item.description:
Gaming engine giant Unity recently announced the official public beta launch of Unity AI, which includes three core components: a dedicated Agent, AI Gateway, and official MCP Server, establishing a fundamental connection channel between third-party large models and the Unity engine. 游戏引擎巨头 Unity 近日宣布 Unity AI 正式开启公测，内置专属 Agent、AI Gateway 和官方 MCP Server 三项核心组件，打通了第三方大模型与 Unity 引擎的底层连接通道。

  • The built-in Agent is trained on over 20 years of Unity's best practice data, allowing it to directly read scene context, understand game objects and components, and perform editor operations within the editor, while also supporting rollback and permission management for AI-generated content. 内置 Agent 基于 Unity 超过 20 年的最佳实践数据训练而成，可在编辑器内直接读取场景上下文、理解游戏对象与组件，并执行编辑器操作，同时支持对 AI 生成内容进行回滚和权限管控；
  • AI Gateway provides an access channel for third-party Agents to developers who have subscribed to other AI services, and such calls do not consume official Unity credits. AI Gateway 为已订阅其他 AI 服务的开发者提供了第三方 Agent 的接入通道，此类调用不消耗 Unity 官方积分；
  • The official MCP Server allows developers to bridge and control the Unity editor from external IDEs, and Unity officially states that its execution performance is superior to existing open-source alternatives. 官方 MCP Server 则允许开发者从外部 IDE 桥接并控制 Unity 编辑器，Unity 官方称其执行性能优于现有开源替代方案。

Regarding pricing, Unity Pro, Enterprise, and Industry subscribers can directly use the above features within their existing seats without additional payment; personal users can apply for a 14-day free trial, receiving a one-time grant of 1000 credits, and after the trial, it converts to a monthly $10 subscription, including 1000 credits per month. 定价上，Unity Pro、Enterprise 和 Industry 订阅用户可在现有席位中直接使用上述功能，无需额外付费；个人版用户可申请 14 天免费试用，获赠一次性 1000 积分，试用结束后转为每月 10 美元订阅，每月包含 1000 积分。

Regarding data privacy, the official statement indicates that user project data is by default only used to provide services and not for training AI models; AI-generated assets will have metadata tags embedded to mark their source. 数据隐私方面，官方表示用户项目数据默认仅用于提供服务，不用于训练 AI 模型；AI 生成资产将嵌入元数据标签，标记其生成来源。

item.title: 字节跳动 TRAE SOLO 登陆移动端，可通过对话控制电脑
item.guid: 字节跳动-TRAE-SOLO-登陆移动端，可通过对话控制电脑
item.description:
ByteDance's AI programming product TRAE officially launched its TRAE SOLO mobile version yesterday, allowing users to initiate tasks, continue working, or remotely control their computers anytime via their phones. 字节跳动旗下 AI 编程产品 TRAE 昨日正式推出 TRAE SOLO 移动端，用户现可通过手机随时发起任务、继续工作或远程操控电脑。

TRAE SOLO is positioned as an intelligent work assistant, supporting professional tasks such as product development, data analysis, report generation, and PPT creation through conversation. TRAE SOLO 定位为智能工作助手，支持通过对话完成产品开发、数据分析、报告生成、PPT 制作等专业任务。

item.title: 苹果推出彩虹系列新品
item.guid: 苹果推出彩虹系列新品
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple, as usual, launched new Apple Watch Pride Edition Braided Solo Loop bands, matching watch faces, and iPhone and iPad wallpapers on schedule in May. 昨天，苹果照惯例在五月准时推出新款 Apple Watch 彩虹版回环式运动表带、配套表盘及 iPhone 和 iPad 壁纸。

According to reports, the new Pride Edition Braided Solo Loop band is woven from 11 colors of nylon yarn and is priced at 379 yuan. 据介绍，本次新款彩虹版回环式运动表带使用 11 种颜色的尼龙纱线织成，售价 379 元。

The new Pride watch face echoes the band's design, dynamically refracting different colors. The watch face design includes two geometric patterns: scattered colored light consistent with the hour hand's direction, and vertical lines reflecting the colorful stripes of the woven pattern. 而新版彩虹表盘呼应表带设计，可动态折射不同色彩。表盘设计包含两种几何图案：与时针方向一致的散射状彩色光线，以及反射编织图案多彩条纹的垂直线条。

The new wallpapers have also landed in iOS 26.5 RC and iPadOS 26.5 RC, pushed to developers yesterday, with the official release expected this month. 新壁纸也已经登陆昨日面向开发者推送的 iOS 26.5 RC 和 iPadOS 26.5 RC，正式版预计本月到来。

item.title: 微信发布五一数据报告：景区支付笔数环比涨 277%、宠物经济增长突出
item.guid: 微信发布五一数据报告：景区支付笔数环比涨-277%、宠物经济增长突出
item.description:
WeChat's official account "WeChat Pai" yesterday released the 2026 May Day holiday data report. The report shows that during this year's May Day holiday, domestic consumption activity was concentrated in five cities: Beijing, Shanghai, Chongqing, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen. The top three cities with the highest year-on-year increase in consumption amount were Xinxiang, Hohhot, and Anyang, respectively. 微信官方公众号「微信派」昨日发布 2026 年五一假期数据报告。报告显示，今年五一期间国内消费热度集中在北京、上海、重庆、广州、深圳五座城市，消费金额同比涨幅最高的三座城市依次为新乡、呼和浩特、安阳。

    WeChat Pay's transaction volume in scenic spots surged by 277% month-on-month, and the top three most searched scenic spots on WeChat were Tiananmen Square, Orange Isle, and Wansui Mountain Wuxia City;

    The number of times catering mini-programs were opened increased by 26% month-on-month. Chongqing, Chengdu, Wuhan, Suzhou, and Hangzhou (excluding Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen) ranked among the top five cities in terms of catering industry transaction volume;

    Transaction volume related to performances and events increased by 153% month-on-month, and the number of times movie and performance mini-programs were opened increased by 198% month-on-month;

    The publication volume of content related to Video Account "Yue BA" increased by 175% compared to the three days before the holiday, and content related to "Super League" increased by 103%.

Pet consumption also showed a significant growth trend. During the May Day holiday, the transaction volume in the pet food, supplies, and services industry increased by 62% month-on-month, and WeChat Mini Shop pet supplies order volume increased by 127% year-on-year. 宠物消费亦呈现明显增长态势。五一期间，宠物食品用品及服务行业交易笔数环比上涨 62%，微信小店宠物用品订单量同比上涨 127%。

item.title: 抖音辟谣红果短剧收费
item.guid: 抖音辟谣红果短剧收费
item.description:
Late on May 4th, Li Liang, Vice President of Douyin Group, posted an article denying the recent online rumors that "Hongguo Short Drama has started charging fees." 5 月 4 日深夜，抖音集团副总裁李亮发文，否认近期网络上流传的「红果短剧开始收费」说法。

Li Liang stated that Hongguo Short Drama had previously introduced some film and television content, and according to the compliance requirements of relevant copyright holders and industry practices, a small portion of this film and television content requires VIP access to watch. 李亮表示，红果短剧此前陆续引入了部分影视内容，依据相关版权方的合规要求与行业惯例，该部分少数影视内容需开通 VIP 权限才能观看。

He emphasized that the ad-free membership service is a voluntary option to meet users' differentiated experiences, will not be mandatory, and will not change the core model of users watching dramas for free. 他强调，免广告会员服务属于满足用户差异化体验的自愿选项，不会强制收费，也不会改变用户免费追剧的核心模式。

Li Liang also pointed out that both the ad-free VIP service and the very small amount of film and television content that requires VIP access were features that existed early on when Hongguo launched in February 2024, and are not recent additions. 李亮同时指出，无论是免广告 VIP 服务，还是极少量需 VIP 才能观看的影视内容，均为 2024 年 2 月红果上线早期便已存在的功能，并非近期新增动作。

item.title: 2026 普利策奖揭晓，作家李翊云获回忆录奖
item.guid: 2026-普利策奖揭晓，作家李翊云获回忆录奖
item.description:
Yesterday, the 2026 Pulitzer Prizes were officially announced, and Chinese-American writer Yiyun Li won the Memoir/Autobiography award for her memoir "Things in Nature Merely Grow." 昨天，2026 年普利策奖正式揭幕，华裔作家李翊云凭借回忆录《万物自然生长》（Things in Nature Merely Grow）获得回忆录 / 自传奖。

The work, published last year, was written by Yiyun Li for her deceased 19-year-old son. In their citation, the jury stated that the work, with a restrained yet defiant tone, focuses on truth, language, and the continuation of life, chronicling the mental journey of accepting fate. 该作于去年出版，是李翊云为其逝世的 19 岁小儿子所写。评委会在授奖词中称，这部作品以克制而倔强的笔调，聚焦于真相、语言与生命的延续，书写了接纳命运的心路历程。

Among other literature and arts awards this year: 在今年其他文学艺术类奖项中：

    Fiction Award: Daniel Kraus, "Angel Down"

    Drama Award: Bess Wohl, "Liberation"

    History Writing Award: Jill Lepore, "We the People: A History of the U.S. Constitution"

    Poetry Award: Juliana Spahr, "Ars Poeticas"

    Nonfiction Award: Brian Goldstone, "There Is No Place for Us: Working and Homeless in America"

    Music Award: Gabriela Lena Frank, composer, "Picaflor: A Future Myth"

item.title: 诺兰《奥德赛》正式预告发布
item.guid: 诺兰《奥德赛》正式预告发布
item.description:
Christopher Nolan's new film "Odyssey" released its official trailer yesterday, scheduled for North American release on July 17. 克里斯托弗 · 诺兰执导的新片《奥德赛》昨日发布正式预告，北美定档 7 月 17 日。

"Odyssey" is adapted from Homer's epic of the same name, telling the story of Odysseus's arduous ten-year journey home after the Trojan War. The entire film was shot with IMAX film cameras, making it Nolan's most technically ambitious work to date. 《奥德赛》改编自荷马同名史诗，讲述特洛伊战争结束后，奥德修斯历经十年艰险回乡的故事。全片采用 IMAX 胶片摄影机拍摄，为诺兰迄今技术规格最高的一部作品。

item.title: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》定档 5 月 22 日
item.guid: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》定档-5-月-22-日
item.description:
"Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" recently released a new poster and trailer, scheduled for release on May 22. 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》日前发布新海报与预告片，定档 5 月 22 日上映。

The film continues the series' main storyline, focusing on the adventure of Din Djarin and his Force-sensitive apprentice Grogu, a non-biological father-son duo, as they undertake a top-secret mission in a turbulent galaxy. 影片延续剧集主线，聚焦丁·贾伦与原力学徒古古这对非血缘父子在动荡银河系中执行绝密任务的冒险故事。
